overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student character exploring connected medieval castle rooms. The character moves through a stone hall with wooden tables, ascends a staircase, and enters a cozy chamber with a large fireplace, magical artifacts, and collectible objects.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval castle hall with long dining tables and stone arches

events.description: turns left toward the main hall area with wooden tables

agents.ego_description: walking through a stone corridor into a larger hall with wooden tables and benches

entered.detail: tall dark wooden cabinet with glass panels
gothic stone arch with carved details
long wooden dining tables with benches
ornate iron chandelier hanging from ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a corner of a medieval castle room and walks toward a large hall. The space features stone walls, gothic arches, and long wooden tables. The lighting comes from wall-mounted lamps and chandeliers, creating a warm atmosphere in the stone interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase leading to upper level

events.description: begins ascending the stone staircase from the main hall
approaches and enters wooden doorway to upper room

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone staircase and approaching the doorway to a different room

entered.detail: curved stone staircase with wooden banister
dark wooden door frame leading to another room

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the main hall and ascends a curved stone staircase. The space becomes narrower and more enclosed. At the top of the stairs, a wooden doorway leads to another room with warmer lighting visible beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper common room with large fireplace and magical artifacts

events.description: enters room with bright warm fireplace illumination
turns right to explore the room perimeter

agents.ego_description: walking around the room examining the fireplace, furniture, and magical objects

notable_agents.action: standing near a table in the background facing away

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and carved mantelpiece
ornate red rug covering the stone floor
tall shelves filled with books and magical items
human skeleton standing in the corner
large decorative globe on wooden stand

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cozy upper room dominated by a large stone fireplace with a roaring fire. The room features red carpets, leather armchairs, and magical artifacts including a skeleton model and antique globe. Another student stands near the back wall. The lighting is warmer here, primarily from the fireplace.

scene_state.functional_zone: fireplace area with collectible magical objects

events.description: approaches glowing Demiguise Moon object on stand
turns away from the globe and walks toward the fireplace

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining magical objects including a glowing Demiguise Moon near the fireplace

entered.detail: tall ornate ceramic vase with lid
small glowing blue object in a cage-like holder
plush red velvet armchair with wooden frame

segments.scene_description: The character explores the area near the large fireplace, approaching a glowing magical object (Demiguise Moon) and examining the antique globe. The room contains various magical artifacts, plush furniture, and warm firelight. The character moves slowly around the furniture, taking in the details of the medieval decor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand, open castle hall into a secluded and cozy upper chamber. It begins in a corner of a medieval room, moving through a large hall defined by gothic arches, stone walls, and long wooden tables illuminated by warm chandeliers. As the character leaves the main hall, the space narrows and becomes more enclosed while ascending a curved stone staircase toward a wooden doorway. The scene then opens into a warm upper room dominated by a roaring stone fireplace, red carpets, and leather armchairs where another student stands. Finally, the camera glides through the intimate space, passing a skeleton model and an antique globe before approaching a glowing magical object amidst the plush medieval decor.
